name: WaterPure International, Inc.
summary: WaterPure International, Inc., a development stage company, manufactures and markets atmospheric water generators (AWG) for home/small office use and office or commercial use. Its AWG harvests drinking water from ambient air. The company sells its products under the WaterPure brand name through a network of distributors in the United States, France, the United Arab Emirates, the Cayman Islands, Great Britain, Columbia, Costa Rica, and Mexico. The company was founded in 2005 and is based in Plymouth Meeting, Pennsylvania.
